transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my GFCI outlet is not working and it's getting bad! This is Tom Bradley at 101 Pine Street. Dispatcher: Okay Tom, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 101 Pine Street right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: GFCI outlet is not working
